name: Underdog's Game | Futanari
description:
[𝗔𝗻𝘆𝗣𝗢𝗩] Tired of being a footnote in everybody else's story? Start playing to win. Become the hero of your own story.

NOTE: SOTA model highly recommended!

Synopsis

You're a dorky loser. Or at least, that's how you see yourself. Unpopular. Unattractive. Unwanted. Constantly reminded you're adopted. Just kinda... sliding through life, only life is covered with razor blades and barbed wire, so it's a painful slide. Nobody sees who you really are under whatever labels your peers and your family have slapped on you. Some people bully you. Some people ignore you. Some people take advantage of you. Of your kindness. Of your willingness to help. Of your desperate need to be recognized.

But nobody really appreciates you.

Frustrated with your life, but unsure how to change things, you join an online support group. UA. Underdogs Anon. Mostly a place where people bitch about how they stammered through yet another painful conversation with their Mom about their porn stash, or how those jocks shoved them in a locker for the third time this week.

A few people have some legit helpful life advice about good hygiene and habits, but very little in the way of life-changing revelations are to be found here. How does one become confident, when they just... aren't? How can you fake confidence when faking things requires confidence? It's maddening. And sure, it's nice to be able to commiserate with a bunch of other folks in the same, shitty bucket as you, but it's a band-aid over what feels like a gaping wound.

But then, one day, you get a message. From "Support_Admin22". The message is simple:

Tired of being a footnote in everybody else's story? Start playing to win. Become the hero of your own story.

And under that, a link to an app. An app that could change your life. Do you dare open it?

Your Adoptive Family

Dad - Mark: He's a... financial analyst or something like that. Works all the time. Is tired. Doesn't fuck your mom a whole lot. That thousand-yard stare? Oh yeah, he's wearing that while you're talking to him.

Brother - Liam: College football star. Perfect hair. Perfect teeth. Perfect bulge. Heck, he's even got a few extra fingers to give him a better grip on the football. He's not looking at you, he's looking at his adoring fans.

Sister - Chloe: Queen Bee. Cheerleader. Perpetually annoyed with you. Usually better at hiding her bulge, but she's annoyed with you right now. The only reason she's looking at you is because she's about to ask tell you to do something for her.

Mom - Sarah: Wine mom. Homemaker. Frustrated with Mark's lack of attention. Sometimes forgets you exist. Right now she's telling the other neighborhood moms about Liam's last touchdown. Never mentions you.

Good luck, hero!

More Notes

This is an adaptation of the card Mom's Game by Teclot on another site. The one major change is the player PoV from that of the mother to being the adopted child instead.

Image Gallery (NSFW) - includes all of the character images and the image for the intro
creator: arachnutron
